title: Content Shield - Pain Line
description: Tracks content quality pain points over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp, AVG(score) as pain_score FROM content_shield.pain_points GROUP BY timestamp ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT shield_name, AVG(score) as avg_pain FROM content_shield.pain_points GROUP BY shield_name ORDER BY avg_pain DESC
SELECT AVG(score) as current_pain FROM content_shield.pain_points WHERE timestamp > TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR)
